diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,148 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: default Hono class export and type exports (Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Context, parseRequest, createMiddleware, setLogger
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./context, ./request, ./client/*
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point file that re-exports Hono class and core types, serves as the public API surface
+- Copy-safe detail: exports: { Hono: './hono', Context: './context', HonoRequest: './request', InferRequestType: './client', InferResponseType: './client', ClientRequestOptions: './client' }
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundHandler, NotFoundResponse, TypedResponse, Result
+- Internal names noticed: Context, HonoBase, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, ContentfulStatusCode, ContentTypes, MethodNotAllowMessage, MethodNames, MergePathFn, ParseBodyFn, HasRequiredKeys, ExtractSchema, Endpoint, Fetch, ApplyRequest, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types, ./router, ./utils/http-methods
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions module containing environment types, handler types, router types, client types and utility types
+- Copy-safe detail: all types including Env, H, Handler<>, NotFoundHandler, TypedResponse, Input, Result
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/*, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase with default routing, handles app setup and request execution
+- Copy-safe detail: export class Hono<E, S, BasePath> extends HonoBase
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Hono options, mount method, route matching, notFound and onError handlers
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, Router, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, notFoundHandler, errorHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class with mounting logic, routing setup, middleware composition and error/not-found handling
+- Copy-safe detail: class Hono, get path function, mount method, all route handlers (route, put, post, patch, delete, options)
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context interface, get, set, var, newResponse, redirect, set, render, html, json, body
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, FetchEventLike, Env, Input, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, ResponseHeader, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, ExecutionContext, Data
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./http-exception
+- Plain-Engine summary: Request context with response methods, handles variables, headers, cookies, not-found, error handling and content rendering
+- Copy-safe detail: export interface Context, export type Renderer, export type ExecutionContext, export interface Data, export function c.* methods
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, param, header, validated, cache, raw, path, method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, Body, BodyCache, ValidationTargets, ParseBodyOptions, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, decodeURIComponent_, tryDecode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Request class wrapping native Request, providing typed param/header access, validation, caching and form/body parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: export class HonoRequest, param method, header method, cache method, validated method, getBody methods, parseBody usage
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single constant file exports a module-scoped unique symbol for regex match results
+- Copy-safe detail: export const GET_MATCH_RESULT: unique symbol = Symbol('get.match.result')
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: BodyData, ParseBody options, parseBody
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility for handling form data with dot/all notation options, converts FormData to typed body structures
+- Copy-safe detail: export type BodyData, export type ParseBodyOptions, export interface ParseBody, export const parseBody: ParseBody
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, dispatch
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility implementing koa-compose pattern, chains handlers with next() and catches errors/not-found
+- Copy-safe detail: export const compose, dispatch internal function, error handling, not-found handling
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException, parseResponse, DetailedError, exported via './utils'
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode, Response, Error (parent)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status, ./utils (re-exports parseResponse, DetailedError)
+- Plain-English summary: HTTPException class for throwing HTTP error responses with status codes, DetailedError for fetch errors with detail/codes
+- Copy-safe detail: export class HTTPException, export { parseResponse, DetailedError }
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc (helper), parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client/hc, ./client/utils, ./client/types
+- Plain-English summary: Client API entry point, exports hc helper for client creation and utility functions for response parsing and types
+- Copy-safe detail: export default hc, export { parseResponse, DetailedError }
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc, buildPathsFromSchema, ClientRequestImpl, createPath
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, FormValue, ValidationTargets, Callback, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, serialize (cookie)
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP Client implementation, creates proxy-based request chains from schema, builds client objects with path/method/action methods
+- Copy-safe detail: export function hc, class ClientRequestImpl with fetch method, buildPathsFromSchema
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: ClientResponseOfEndpoint, ClientRequest, ClientRequestOptions, BuildSearchParamsFn, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, Endpoint, ExtractSchema
+- Internal names noticed: MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, HonoRequest, UnionToIntersection, HasRequiredKeys, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, ObjectType
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side type definitions for schema, requests, responses, options and endpoint type extraction
+- Copy-safe detail: export type ClientResponseOfEndpoint, export type ClientRequest, export type ClientRequestOptions, export type BuildSearchParamsFn, export type InferResponse/RequestType, export type Fetch/Endpoint/ExtractSchema
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ObjectType, isObject, Callback
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL manipulation, query param serialization, request building and object deep merging
+- Copy-safe detail: export const mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, export function deepMerge, export { DetailedError }
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError, detectResponseType (helper)
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status, ./utils (re-exports DetailedError)
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch-result parser wrapping Response, extracts json/text data, throws DetailedError on non-OK status, detects response type from Content-Type
+- Copy-safe detail: export async function fetchRP: parses Response._data or body, export class DetailedError: extends Error with statusCode/detail/code/log properties, const nullBodyResponses: Set([101, 204, 205, 304]), function detectResponseType: checks Content-Type regex
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, HandleOptions, handle
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter, registers Hono app with addEventListener('fetch'), exposes fire and handle functions
+- Copy-safe detail: const fire: takes app and options, executes addEventListener('fetch', handle(...)), export { handle, fire }
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle, HandleOptions
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, FetchEvent, Handler, globalThis.fetch
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service worker fetch handler, wraps app.fetch call, can fallback to custom fetch function on 404
+- Copy-safe detail: export const handle: takes app and opts={fetch: globalThis.fetch}, returns Handler function, app.fetch(evt.request, {}, evt), fallback to opts.fetch on 404
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent
+- Internal names noticed: clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId, respondWith, waitUntil, props, exports
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Extended FetchEvent interface for ServiceWorker with custom properties (clientId, handled, preloadResponse, resultingClientId)
+- Copy-safe detail: interface ExtendableEvent with waitUntil, export interface FetchEvent extends ExtendableEvent with clientId/handled/preloadResponse/request/respondWith
+
+## Path Inventory
+
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
